# Campbell K9s — Dog Training in Greater Boston & Providence

Campbell K9s provides board-and-train bootcamp, adventure hikes, behavior modification, and in-home pet sitting for dogs in Greater Boston, Providence, and coastal Rhode Island.

## Services
- [Board & Train Bootcamp](/services/#bootcamp) — 3-week residential training program
- [Adventure Hikes](/services/#hikes) — Off-leash group hikes on conservation land
- [Behavior Modification](/services/#behavior) — Reactivity, anxiety, aggression
- [Leash Walks](/services/#leash-walks) — Structured neighborhood walks
- [In-Home Pet Sitting](/services/#pet-sitting) — Overnight care in your home
- [Scholarship Program](/services/#scholarship) — Reduced-cost training for rescue dogs

## About the Team
- [Matt Campbell](/our-team/#matt-campbell) — Lead Trainer & Founder
- [Mary Campbell](/our-team/#mary-campbell) — Co-Founder & Pack Coordinator
- [Joe Bergeron](/our-team/#joe-bergeron) — Adventure Hikes Lead
